title: Chapter 2
content:
Chapter 2: I Became the Silver-Haired Loli Goddess’s Masturbation Assistant

In the middle of a barren wasteland surrounded by an overwhelmingly massive mountain range, Lucia and I faced each other and bowed.

"I’m... Lucia..."

"Ah, I’m Masaharu Ooi."

"Ooi... Masaharu... That’s a strange-sounding name..."

Considering she had been a gigantic dragon just moments ago, Lucia spoke in a very small, flat voice with almost no intonation. She gave off the vibe of a shy, introverted middle-school girl.

Lucia used magic to create some clothes for me, which I put on. It was a simple pull-over garment that looked straight out of a medieval European fantasy.

On the other hand, Lucia was completely covered by a simple white robe with zero sex appeal. Still, I imagined she was probably naked underneath and let my brain fill in the erotic details. I could faintly see what looked like small nipple protrusions on her flat chest, and there were no panty lines on her smooth butt.

...She really had an extremely childish, loli body.

"Are you staring that much because a Dragon God is rare?"

"Ah, sorry."

I wasn’t staring because she was rare. I was just looking at her in a perverted way.

So this girl was a Dragon God. Since she had transformed into this form after climaxing, this must be her true appearance.

Still... right after arriving in another world, I had forced my way through a goddess’s hymen and shoved my entire body into her womb. That was pretty blasphemous. But Lucia didn’t seem angry, so I guess it was fine.

"By the way, what were you doing earlier, Lucia?"

"Umm..."

Lucia pinched the tips of her bangs and started fidgeting with her silver hair in front of her forehead.

Was she bad at making eye contact while talking?

It looked like she was trying to hide behind her bangs like a curtain to escape my gaze.

Her cheeks were faintly blushing — clear proof she was embarrassed.

"Do you know the concept of ’Status’?"

"Yeah, I do. It’s pretty much common knowledge in my world."

"Then I’ll show you. Status Open..."

When Lucia muttered the words, a glowing window appeared in front of her hand.

Race: Dragon God

Lv: 120

HP: 3200

MP: 5680

Physical Attack: 1323

Magic Power: 9500

Physical Defense: 2440

Magic Defense: 6200

At first glance, the numbers looked huge, but since I didn’t know the standards of this world, I couldn’t tell if Lucia was incredibly strong or just average. She was a goddess, so her stats were probably very high.

I wondered if I could do it too.

"Status Open."

I tried waving my hand, but nothing happened.

"Do you want to see your own status too, Masaharu?"

"Yeah. Also, you can just call me Masaharu instead of Ooi Masaharu."

"Got it... Masaharu. Give me your hand..."

I did as she asked. Lucia took my hand and chanted, "Status Open."

Lv: 21

HP: 18

MP: 2

Physical Attack: 16

Magic Power: 0

Physical Defense: 17

Magic Defense: 0

"What the hell!? I’m super weak!"

"That’s normal for a human..."

My outburst must have been funny, because Lucia looked away, trying to hold back her laughter.

According to Lucia, humans are born at Lv 0. If they live normally, their level goes up by one with each year they age, and their stats rise by 1 as well.

In other words, at 21 years old, my level was normal, but my other stats were quite low.

"It’s okay. As promised... I’ll give you my blessing..."

Lucia tried to cheer me up as I looked depressed.

Then, blushing shyly, she said:

"Um... lower your waist a bit..."

"Like this?"

"Nn..."

Lucia’s face drew closer, and I heard a soft chu sound on my cheek.

Erection—

This unpopular virgin got hard just from a girl’s kiss.

I, who barely got excited by normal erotic videos, was now fully erect from this clumsy little kiss!

Videos and reality really are different things!

The emotion was so strong that tears started flowing on their own...

"W-why are you crying...? Here, look at your status."

"Huh?"

Lv: 21

HP: 338

MP: 570

Physical Attack: 148

Magic Power: 950

Physical Defense: 261

Magic Defense: 620

Special Ability: Dragon God’s Blessing ・ Sex Warrior Lv3

"Ooooh..."

It was nowhere near Lucia’s level, but every number had increased dramatically.

"With the special ability ’Dragon God’s Blessing,’ one-tenth of my stats have been added to yours..."

"Thank you."

However, I was more curious about "Sex Warrior Lv3" than the blessing. What the hell was that? It had to be a typo for "Holy Warrior," right? Surely it’s "Holy Warrior," not "Sex Warrior"?

"Anyway, going back to what I was saying..."

Damn. The topic changed before I could ask about the Sex Warrior thing.

"This..."

Lucia pointed at her own status, specifically at Physical Defense: 2440.

"My defense changes depending on the body part... but it’s so high that nothing can go inside me..."

"I see..."

My base physical attack was only 16, so no matter what the calculation formula was, there was no way a cock with 16 attack power could pierce a membrane with 2440 defense.

"That’s why... when I turn into a dragon... I thought maybe the dragon with the biggest and hardest cock in the world could... violate me..."

"So you were trying to lose your virginity by masturbating and luring a dragon with your lewd scent..."

"Yeah..."

"You’re such a huge pervert!"

"Uuu... I don’t want to hear that from you, Masaharu... You put your arm inside, then your whole body... You’re not supposed to put anything other than a penis inside a girl’s pussy!"

"Looks like common sense is different between our worlds..."

"Also... what did you do at the end? My head went completely blank..."

"Oh. I was about to suffocate... so I thought there might be air inside your womb."

"Womb?"

"...You don’t know what that is?"

"...Nope."

I see. The level of medical knowledge is probably different between Japan and this world... So she doesn’t have that kind of knowledge. Maybe I can be an eroge knowledge cheat in this world.

By the way...

"Hey, Lucia. How old are you?"

"14..."

"So even gods don’t live for thousands of years or anything?"

"Nope. I’m a very young god who was recently born."

"At 14, it’s completely normal to still be a virgin. Don’t do anything reckless. You shouldn’t let yourself get violated by a dragon or anything."

"U-um... I won’t do it anymore. But... um..."

"Hm?"

"I’d be really happy... if you helped me again... It felt really, really good..."

Lucia said something extremely perverted while blushing shyly, which instantly made me hard again. Thank god these loose clothes hid my erection.

"I’ll help you masturbate whenever you want, as long as you desire it. But next time, please stay in human form."

"Understood... Then, from now on, when I want to masturbate, I’ll ask you, Masaharu."

Ding.

A mysterious sound echoed inside my head.

Job changed from Unemployed to Dragon God Masturbation Assistant.

And so, I acquired the ultra-rare job that was probably the first and only one of its kind in this world’s history.

"Well then... I’m going to sleep... yawn..."

"Huh?"

"I’ve been rubbing my pussy for so long... I’m sleep-deprived..."

Thud.

Lucia fell forward without even trying to cushion her fall.

It looked painful, but with 2440 physical defense, maybe it didn’t hurt at all.

And then—

Zugun...

Just like in battle shonen manga when the protagonist drops his heavy training weights and they sink into the ground, Lucia’s body sank straight into the earth...

Zuguu... Zugugugu...

Her body kept sinking deeper and deeper.

"H-hey, what are you doing?"

"It’s cold on the surface... so I’m going to sleep inside the magma..."

Her voice grew fainter as she descended.

"If my pussy starts feeling itchy again, I’ll call for you... Until then, Masaharu, you can go explore the other world..."

"O-okay."

And just like that, Lucia disappeared into the depths of the ground.

Well, now I’m in trouble.

I started in a barren wasteland surrounded by mountains. Classic isekai beginning.

For now, I should look for a female knight.

Since this is another world, if I walk around a bit, I’m bound to find a female knight getting attacked by orcs, right?

I’ll check whether their assholes are actually weak.

Having set my goal for life in this other world, I started walking forward with high hopes.
